valueProp.label: Why Terrassea
valueProp.title: Built for hospitality professionals
valueProp.subtitle: Everything you need to source, compare and order outdoor furniture — in one place.
valueProp.card1Text: Compare offers from multiple suppliers on a single product. Price, stock, delivery times — all at a glance.
valueProp.card2Text: Our engine generates curated selections adapted to your establishment type, style and budget.
valueProp.card3Text: Every supplier is selected for CHR-grade quality, delivery reliability and professional service across Europe.

cta.label: Ready to start?
cta.subtitle: Join the hospitality professionals who trust Terrassea to source their outdoor furniture across Europe.

products.title: Product Hub
products.subtitle: Professional furniture sourcing — search, compare and select.
products.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, material, color, style...

partners.title: Partner Network
partners.heroSubtitle: A curated ecosystem of verified manufacturers, brands and resellers powering the European hospitality industry. Every partner is reviewed and approved by Terrassea.
partners.featuredTitle: Get featured at the top of the network
partners.featuredDesc: Featured suppliers are seen first by hospitality professionals. Upgrade to Growth or Elite to unlock featured placement.
partners.noPartnersTitle: No partners yet in this category
partners.noPartnersDesc: Be the first — featured placements available now.
partners.identityNotice: Supplier identity revealed in confirmed quote only

becomePartner.title: What best describes you?
becomePartner.supplierDesc: You supply outdoor CHR furniture and want to reach hospitality buyers across Europe.
becomePartner.designerDesc: You design hospitality spaces. Sourcing support and curated products — at no cost.

proService.headline: Not for every project — for the ones where getting it wrong is expensive.
proService.subtitle: For large-scale hospitality projects — hotels, resorts, restaurant openings, beach clubs.
proService.card1Desc: A Terrassea sourcing expert analyses your project and comes back with a tailored approach within 48 business hours.
proService.card2Desc: Products matched to your space, style, budget and technical constraints — with matched suppliers and net pricing.
proService.card3Desc: One point of contact for all quotes, delivery scheduling and supplier follow-up.
proService.card4Desc: Our fee is paid by suppliers on confirmed orders. You get expert sourcing at zero cost.
proService.under100Desc: Our Project Builder generates curated product concepts in minutes — free, no commitment.
proService.step1Desc: Fill in the project brief below. 5 minutes, no commitment.
proService.step2Desc: Our team reviews your request within 24 hours and confirms we can help.
proService.step3Desc: 3 curated proposals with matched suppliers and pricing, within 5 business days.
proService.step4Desc: You choose what fits. We handle the rest — orders, delivery, follow-up.
proService.formSubtitle: 5 minutes. No commitment. If your project qualifies, we'll confirm within 24 hours and start working on your proposals.
proService.formDisclaimer: No commitment · Our team confirms eligibility within 24h · Free for the client
proService.requestReceivedDesc: We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
proService.requestReceivedDetail: Our sourcing team has your brief. We'll review it and confirm we can help — then get started on your 3 proposals within 5 business days.
proService.notQualifiedTitle: Great news — your project is a perfect fit for our Project Builder.
proService.notQualifiedDesc: Pro Service is designed for projects above {{covers}} covers or €{{budget}} budget. Your project is well-served by our self-service tools.
proService.qualifiedMsg: Your project qualifies for Pro Service — submit to confirm.
proService.notQualifiedMsg: Pro Service is for projects with 100+ covers or €35,000+ budget. Below this threshold, our Project Builder is the right tool.

formFields.scale: Project scale — used to confirm eligibility

proService.forYes1Sub: Terrace + pool deck + garden = complex multi-supplier coordination
proService.forYes2Sub: Volume + deadline + first-time procurement = you need an expert
proService.forYes3Sub: Marine-grade specs + volume orders + tight seasonal deadlines
proService.forYes4Sub: Multi-project coordination and pro pricing across all orders
proService.forNo1Sub: → Our Project Builder is built exactly for you
proService.forNo2Sub: → Browse the catalogue and request a direct quote

inspirations.createProject: Create my project with this style
inspirations.ctaDesc: Describe your space — our engine generates 3 custom concepts with matched products.

footer.description: The European hospitality project platform. Design your outdoor space, discover premium furniture solutions, and connect with sourcing partners.

partnerDetail.galleryComingSoon: Gallery coming soon — contact via Terrassea for full catalogue
partnerDetail.identityProtectedDesc: The full name and contact details of this supplier are revealed exclusively in a confirmed Terrassea quote. This protects both parties and ensures fair sourcing conditions for all hospitality professionals.
partnerDetail.sourceFromDesc: Browse their catalogue or create a project brief — we'll include this supplier in your curated proposals.
partnerDetail.anonymityNotice: Full supplier identity is revealed only in a confirmed quote. All sourcing goes through Terrassea.
